caption: The video appears to be a presentation slide discussing "The shape of the market" with a focus on Android tablets. The slide highlights an analysis based on various techniques, revealing that out of over 150 Android tablets available in the market, fewer than 20 are in compliance with certain standards or regulations. The presenter emphasizes that the actual situation is even worse, suggesting there may be additional issues or complexities not yet addressed. The static nature of the images indicates that this segment of the video is likely dedicated to explaining the implications and details of this market analysis, possibly leading into further discussion on the challenges and potential solutions for improving compliance among Android tablet manufacturers.
